title: Create e-commerce website with product catalog and shopping cart

requirements.text: Create a backend data model for products with fields: id, name, description, price, image URL, and stock quantity

quotes: create a website for product selling

acceptanceCriteria: Product type is defined with all specified fields
CRUD operations are available for managing products

requirements.text: Implement backend functions to add, retrieve, update, and delete products

quotes: create a website for product selling

acceptanceCriteria: addProduct function creates new product entries
getProducts function returns all products
getProduct function returns a single product by ID
updateProduct function modifies existing products
deleteProduct function removes products

requirements.text: Create a product catalog page displaying all available products in a grid layout with product images, names, prices, and 'Add to Cart' buttons

quotes: create a website for product selling

acceptanceCriteria: Products are displayed in a responsive grid
Each product card shows image, name, price, and stock status
Add to Cart button is visible on each product card

requirements.text: Implement a shopping cart system that allows users to add products, view cart contents, adjust quantities, and remove items

quotes: create a website for product selling

acceptanceCriteria: Users can add products to cart from the catalog
Cart displays all added items with quantities and subtotals
Users can increase or decrease item quantities
Users can remove items from cart
Cart shows total price calculation

requirements.text: Create a product detail page showing full product information, larger image, and purchase options

quotes: create a website for product selling

acceptanceCriteria: Product detail page displays complete product information
Users can navigate to detail page by clicking products in catalog
Add to Cart functionality is available on detail page
Stock availability is clearly indicated

requirements.text: Implement a checkout process that collects customer information and completes the order

quotes: create a website for product selling

acceptanceCriteria: Checkout page collects customer name, email, and shipping address
Order summary displays all cart items and total price
Orders are saved to backend with customer details and purchased items
Success confirmation is shown after order completion
Cart is cleared after successful order

requirements.text: Design a modern, professional e-commerce visual theme with a clean product-focused aesthetic using warm earth tones (terracotta, sage green, cream) with clear typography and generous whitespace that emphasizes product imagery and creates a trustworthy shopping experience
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color scheme using warm earth tones throughout the application
Typography hierarchy clearly distinguishes headings, product names, prices, and body text
Layout uses whitespace effectively to highlight products
Design conveys professionalism and builds customer trust

requirements.text: Render generated product images and logo as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: All generated images are available in the public assets directory
Images are properly referenced in product catalog and throughout the application

constraints: Use single-actor Motoko architecture for backend
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: hooks/useInternetIdentity, hooks/useActor, main.tsx, components/ui
nonGoals: Third-party payment gateway integration beyond basic order processing

required: Modern minimalist e-commerce logo with shopping bag icon in terracotta and sage green colors (logo.dim_200x200.png)
Hero banner showing curated product display with warm natural lighting and earth tone background (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Sample product image: handcrafted ceramic bowl with natural texture (product-ceramic-bowl.dim_400x400.png)
Sample product image: organic cotton tote bag in sage green (product-tote-bag.dim_400x400.png)
Sample product image: minimalist wooden desk organizer (product-desk-organizer.dim_400x400.png)
Sample product image: artisan scented candle in terracotta holder (product-candle.dim_400x400.png)
